key_items: Michael Saylor signals BTC buy with MSTR buyback of $1.5B in convertible notes; Strategy accumulating aggressively
Major institutional adoption: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala raises Bitcoin ETF stake 16% to $566M, Japan's biggest brokerages launching crypto trusts, Italy's Intesa Sanpaolo doubles holdings to $235M
CLARITY Act advances in Senate Banking Committee 15-9, removing regulatory uncertainty and unlocking retail adoption trust catalyst
reasoning: Strong institutional accumulation signals from mega-cap firms (Saylor/MSTR, Mubadala, Intesa Sanpaolo) combined with positive regulatory momentum (CLARITY Act markup) and major financial infrastructure buildout (Japan crypto trusts, CME 24/7 futures) create a supportive macro backdrop for Bitcoin. Current $78-79K pullback appears to be profit-taking within an uptrend rather than a bearish reversal, with long-term holders accumulating and macro fear creating tactical entry points.
risks: Macro headwinds (US Treasury yields at multi-month highs, Iran war uncertainty) combined with technical breakdown below $77.7K support could trigger cascade liquidations toward $75K if risk-off sentiment accelerates.
